top3.sql:
WITH monthly_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date LIKE '2012-02%'
    GROUP BY CustomerID
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalCount
    FROM monthly_consumption
),
high_consumers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS HighCount
    FROM monthly_consumption
    WHERE TotalConsumption > 528.3
)
SELECT 
    ROUND((hc.HighCount * 100.0) / tc.TotalCount, 2) AS Percentage
FROM total_customers tc, high_consu...

WITH feb_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    WHERE 
        Date >= '2012-02-01' AND Date <= '2012-02-29'
),
above_threshold AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS above_count
    FROM 
        feb_consumption
    WHERE 
        Consumption > 528.3
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM 
        feb_consumption
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(100.0 * above_count / total_count, 2) AS percentage
FROM 
    abov...

WITH monthly_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date LIKE '2012-02%'
    GROUP BY CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monthly_consumption WHERE TotalConsumption > 528.3) * 100.0 / 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monthly_consumption), 
        2
    ) AS Percentage;

WITH feb_data AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    WHERE 
        Date LIKE '2012-02%'
),
stats AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN Consumption > 528.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS above_count,
        COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM 
        feb_data
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(100.0 * above_count / total_count, 2) AS percentage
FROM 
    stats;
